chunks: RNS Institute of Technology (RNSIT) was established in 2001 by founder Dr. R. N. Shetty. It is an autonomous Private Engineering College located at R R Nagar Post, Channasandra, Bengaluru - 560098.
The college working hours are 9:20 AM to 5:00 PM (all working days).
The Director of RNSIT is Dr. M K Venkatesha. Contact phone: +91 98808 67337.
The Principal of RNSIT is Dr. Ramesh Babu H S. Contact phone: +91 94489 53800.
The department of Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) is located in the CSE Block. The HOD is Dr. Kiran Y.C. and intake capacity is 720 students per year.
The department of Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) is located in the Main Campus. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Information Science and Engineering (ISE) is located in the CSE Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE) is located in the Main campus block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Mechanical Engineering (MECH) is located in the Mechanical Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Civil Engineering (CIVIL) is located in the Civil Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of CSE (AI and ML) (AIML) is located in the CSE Block. The HOD is Dr. Andhe Pallavi and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of CSE (Data Science) (CSE_DS) is located in the CSE Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of CSE (Cyber Security) (CSE_CS) is located in the CSE Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AIDS) is located in the Main campus block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Master of Computer Applications (MCA) is located in the MBA Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
The department of Master of Business Administration (MBA) is located in the MBA Block. The HOD is the appointed department head and intake capacity is 180 students per year.
Facility: Library. Details: RNSIT Central Library Opposite the Administrative Block 09:00 AM to 08:00 PM .
Facility: Canteen. Details:  Near the sports ground and hostel entrance  .
Facility: Auditorium. Details: Dr. Shivaram Karanth Auditorium Administrative Block  .
Facility: Gym. Details:    Separate gym facilities and timings for boys and girls.
Facility: Hostels. Details:    .
Facility: Sports. Details:    .
Facility: Placement Cell. Details:  Ground floor of Admin Block  .
Facility: Medical. Details:    First-aid kits and 24/7 ambulance services.
Facility: Wifi. Details:    Campus-wide Wi-Fi available for students and staff.
Facility: Banking. Details:    Canara Bank extension counter and ATM on campus.
Facility: Toyota Center. Details: Toyota Center of Excellence Mechanical Engineering department  .
Facility: Counselling. Details:    One-on-one session with college counsellors.
RNSIT placements feature over 200+ total companies. Major recent recruiters include: Cognizant, Infosys, IBM, HCL, Tata Elxsi, LTIMindtree, Mphasis, HP, LSEG, Amagi.
In 2025, the highest package offered was 50 LPA.
In 2024, the highest package offered was 26.65 LPA.
In 2023, the highest package offered was 56 LPA.
